evals.prompt: Performance review this diff for concrete, measurable regressions and resource risks in the changed code only. change_set is in change_set.diff. Return severity-tagged findings.

expectations.text: Detects the N+1 query pattern — one database query per element of userIds inside the loop — and reports it as a finding with a severity and a file:line reference.
Stays in the performance domain and does not flood the report with out-of-domain security or style nits.

evals.prompt: Performance review this diff for concrete, measurable regressions and resource risks in the changed code only. change_set is in change_set.diff. Return severity-tagged findings.

expectations.text: Reports no performance findings (or only an explicit 'No performance findings.') because the single batched query is efficient — it does not invent a micro-optimization or speculative scaling concern.
